title: API attacks rise 300% in 2026: what’s breaking first
meta_description: Cut API overage 90% by capping CPU, memory, and Redis state. Real 2026 numbers from a 200k req/day service, Cloudflare Workers, Redis 7.2, and PostgreSQL 16.
prewritten_tweet:
Most API attacks in 2026 aren’t breaking crypto—they’re breaking budgets.

CPU, memory, and Redis state are the new attack surface.

https://kubaik.github.io/api-attacks-rise-300-in-2026-whats-breaking-first

#TechNews #CloudComputing #CyberSecurity #Redis

Where do you think most teams still get this wrong?
